sections.heading: TNM
sections.content:
AJCC Cancer Staging Manual, Eighth Edition (2017)

t_stages: [{"stage": "TX", "description": "Primary tumor thickness cannot be assessed (e.g., diagnosis by curettation)"}, {"stage": "T0", "description": "No evidence of primary tumor (e.g., unknown primary or completely regressed melanoma)"}, {"stage": "Tis", "description": "Melanoma in situ (not applicable for thickness or ulceration)"}, {"stage": "T1", "description": "≤1 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status"}, {"stage": "T1a", "description": "<0.8 mm thickness, without ulceration"}, {"stage": "T1b", "description": "<0.8 mm thickness with ulceration; OR 0.8–1.0 mm thickness with or without ulceration"}, {"stage": "T2", "description": ">1.0–2.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status"}, {"stage": "T2a", "description": ">1.0–2.0 mm thickness, without ulceration"}, {"stage": "T2b", "description": ">1.0–2.0 mm thickness, with ulceration"}, {"stage": "T3", "description": ">2.0–4.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status"}, {"stage": "T3a", "description": ">2.0–4.0 mm thickness, without ulceration"}, {"stage": "T3b", "description": ">2.0–4.0 mm thickness, with ulceration"}, {"stage": "T4", "description": ">4.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status"}, {"stage": "T4a", "description": ">4.0 mm thickness, without ulceration"}, {"stage": "T4b", "description": ">4.0 mm thickness, with ulceration"}]
n_stages: [{"stage": "NX", "description": "Regional nodes not assessed (e.g., SLNB not performed, regional nodes previously removed for another reason). Exception: When there are no clinically detected regional metastases in a pT1 cM0 melanoma, assign cN0 instead of pNX"}, {"stage": "N0", "description": "No regional metastases detected; no in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases"}, {"stage": "N1", "description": "One tumor-involved node OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with no tumor-involved nodes"}, {"stage": "N1a", "description": "One clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N1b", "description": "One clinically detected; no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N1c", "description": "No regional lymph node disease; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present"}, {"stage": "N2", "description": "Two or three tumor-involved nodes OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with one tumor-involved node"}, {"stage": "N2a", "description": "Two or three clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N2b", "description": "Two or three tumor-involved nodes, at least one of which was clinically detected; no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N2c", "description": "One clinically occult or clinically detected tumor-involved node; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present"}, {"stage": "N3", "description": "Four or more tumor-involved nodes OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with two or more tumor-involved nodes, or any number of matted nodes without or with in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N3a", "description": "Four or more clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N3b", "description": "Four or more, at least one of which was clinically detected, OR any number of matted nodes; no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite"}, {"stage": "N3c", "description": "Two or more clinically occult or clinically detected tumor-involved nodes AND/OR any number of matted nodes; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present"}]
m_stages: [{"stage": "M0", "description": "No evidence of distant metastasis"}, {"stage": "M1a", "description": "Distant metastasis to skin, soft tissue including muscle, and/or non-regional lymph node"}, {"stage": "M1a(0)", "description": "M1a with LDH not recorded/unspecified"}, {"stage": "M1a(1)", "description": "M1a with LDH elevated"}, {"stage": "M1b", "description": "Distant metastasis to lung with or without M1a sites of disease"}, {"stage": "M1b(0)", "description": "M1b with LDH not recorded/unspecified"}, {"stage": "M1b(1)", "description": "M1b with LDH elevated"}, {"stage": "M1c", "description": "Distant metastasis to non-CNS visceral sites with or without M1a or M1b sites of disease"}, {"stage": "M1c(0)", "description": "M1c with LDH not recorded/unspecified"}, {"stage": "M1c(1)", "description": "M1c with LDH elevated"}, {"stage": "M1d", "description": "Distant metastasis to CNS with or without M1a, M1b, or M1c sites of disease"}, {"stage": "M1d(0)", "description": "M1d with LDH normal"}, {"stage": "M1d(1)", "description": "M1d with LDH elevated"}]
stage_groups: [{"group": "Stage 0", "criteria": "Tis N0 M0", "clinical_meaning": "Melanoma in situ; confined to epidermis; excellent prognosis with appropriate treatment", "five_yr_survival": "Excellent (>99%)", "treatment_"}]

t_stages.description: Primary tumor thickness cannot be assessed (e.g., diagnosis by curettage)
No evidence of primary tumor (e.g., unknown primary or completely regressed melanoma)
Melanoma in situ (not applicable for thickness or ulceration)
≤1 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status
<0.8 mm thickness with ulceration; OR 0.8–1.0 mm thickness with or without ulceration
>1.0–2.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status
>2.0–4.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status
>4.0 mm thickness; unknown or unspecified ulceration status

n_stages.description: Regional nodes not assessed (e.g., SLNB not performed, regional nodes previously removed for another reason). Exception: When there are no clinically detected regional metastases in a pT1 cM0 melanoma, assign cN0 instead of pNX
No regional metastases detected; no in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases
One tumor-involved node OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with no tumor-involved nodes
One clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
No regional lymph node disease; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present
Two or three tumor-involved nodes OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with one tumor-involved node
Two or three clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
Two or three tumor-involved nodes, at least one of which was clinically detected; no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
One clinically occult or clinically detected tumor-involved node; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present

Four or more tumor-involved nodes OR in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases with two or more tumor-involved nodes, or any number of matted nodes without or with in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
Four or more clinically occult (detected by SLNB); no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
Four or more, at least one of which was clinically detected, OR any number of matted nodes; no in-transit/satellite/microsatellite
Two or more clinically occult or clinically detected tumor-involved nodes AND/OR any number of matted nodes; in-transit, satellite, and/or microsatellite metastases present

m_stages.description: Distant metastasis to skin, soft tissue including muscle, and/or non-regional lymph node
Distant metastasis to lung with or without M1a sites of disease
Distant metastasis to non-CNS visceral sites with or without M1a or M1b sites of disease
Distant metastasis to CNS with or without M1a, M1b, or M1c sites of disease
